info.title: HRIS cmlabs API
info.description:
Comprehensive API documentation for the HRIS backend service by cmlabs.

All JSON responses follow the standard envelope:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "optional message",
  "data": { ... },
  "error": null,
  "meta": { "page": 1, "limit": 10, "total_items": 100, "total_pages": 10 }
}
```

Authentication uses JWT Bearer tokens. Obtain tokens via `/auth/login` or `/auth/register`.

Subscription features gate write endpoints; read endpoints are generally available to authenticated users.

**Roles:** owner, manager, employee

tags.name: Auth

CreateEmployeeRequest.description: Sent as multipart/form-data. Avatar file is optional.

post.summary: Create leave type (owner, requires leave feature)

get.summary: List all leave quotas (manager, requires leave feature)
Get active schedule for current employee
Get work hours chart (weekly bar chart)
